alkylation reagent: 5 μl of 100 mM iodoacetamide was added to S-alkylate the samples
alkylation concentration: 5 μl of 100 mM iodoacetamide was added
cleavage agent: digestion with trypsin (0.012 μg each time)
fractionation method: purified by hydrophobic interaction chromatography using the octyl-Sepharose CL-4B
fragmentation method: subjecting these major molecular ions to MS2 fragmentation using CID
instrument: analysed by liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS2) on an LTQ Orbitrap Velos-Pro
labeling: the resulting peptides were analysed by LC-MS2
